name: bilibili
description: Bilibili video search, detail, trending/ranking, comments, user profiles — page transport with Wbi signing via L3 adapter

dependencies.searchVideos → getVideoDetail: searchVideos returns bvid used by getVideoDetail
dependencies.getVideoDetail → getVideoComments: getVideoDetail returns aid (as oid) used by getVideoComments
dependencies.searchVideos → getUserInfo: searchVideos returns mid used by getUserInfo
dependencies.getUserInfo → getUserFollowStats: getUserInfo returns mid used by getUserFollowStats (as vmid)
dependencies.getUserInfo → getUploaderStats: getUserInfo returns mid used by getUploaderStats
dependencies.getUserInfo → getUserVideos: getUserInfo returns mid used by getUserVideos
